---
title: "Venue"
---

## Venue

The workshop will take place at the **University of Cambridge Computer Laboratory**, located in the **William Gates Building** on the West Cambridge site.

**Address**  
Department of Computer Science and Technology  
University of Cambridge  
William Gates Building  
15 JJ Thomson Avenue  
Cambridge CB3 0FD  
United Kingdom

::: {.map-container}
<iframe
    width="100%"
    height="420"
    frameborder="0"
    scrolling="no"
    marginheight="0"
    marginwidth="0"
    src="https://www.openstreetmap.org/export/embed.html?bbox=0.0885%2C52.2085%2C0.0955%2C52.2120&amp;layer=mapnik&amp;marker=52.21027%2C0.09192">
</iframe>
:::

[Open the venue on the University of Cambridge map](https://map.cam.ac.uk/Computer+Laboratory){target="_blank"}

## Getting there

The **William Gates Building** is located on the West Cambridge site, off Madingley Road. Further travel information will be added closer to the workshop.
